title: Uncrafting Recipes
description: Uncraft blocks such as wool, honeycomb block, bread and more.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2084a2a13169558fa8a911a7863b0aaeb776c6f3.png)

This data pack allows you to uncraft items such as bricks, wool, bread and more. Every recipe can also be unlocked by obtaining the original block, like in vanilla.

## Uncraftable Blocks
- Amethyst Block -> 4 Amethyst Shards
- Packed Ice -> 9 Ice
- Blue Ice -> 9 Packed Ice
- Bread -> 3 Wheat
- Bricks -> 4 Brick
- Resin Bricks -> 4 Resin Brick
- Nether Bricks -> 4 Nether Brick
- Prismarine Bricks -> 9 Prismarine Shards
- Prismarine -> 4 Prismarine Shards
- Dripstone Block -> 4 Pointed Dripstone
- Honeycomb Block -> 4 Honeycomb
- Nether Wart Block -> 9 Nether Wart
- Quartz Block -> 4 Quartz
- Snow Block -> 4 Snowballs
- Wool -> 4 String
- Clay -> 4 Clay Balls

## 

**💡 Want to make a suggestion?** Join my Discord server! https://discord.gg/Mx9fDBW94W
